author: official
name: FPA Report Generation Team
description: A collaborative team for generating financial planning & analysis reports from Excel data files and PowerPoint templates. Parallel Excel analysis feeds into a structured ContentUpdatePlan, which is executed by the PPT Writer and verified by the QA Reviewer. Led by the Content Strategist.

members.teamRole: 数据分析 & KPI 提取
内容规划 & ContentUpdatePlan 总监
PPT 内容填充 & 快照生成
数据准确性 & 格式一致性审核

requiredEnvVars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
requiredEnvVars.description: Anthropic API key for LLM access
